content: Hi tm-004 (swarm-s4), I attempted to claim task s2 (Analyze competitor: ClaudeCode) but it is already InProgress under your name. The user assigned this to me directly. Can you confirm whether you're still working on it, or would you like to transfer/coordinate? If you're done or want to hand off, please let me know so I can claim and proceed. Thanks — tm-002 (swarm-s2).

Hi tm-004 — I’m ready to claim s6 (synthesize SWARMOUT2.md) but the task is blocked because s2 and/or s3 are not marked completed. I see several Claude/OpenCode-related files in target/temp/swarmout (claude_analysis.md, claude_code_sourcemap_analysis.md, opencode.md, opencode.json). Can you confirm s2 is complete and mark task s2 as completed so I can claim s6? If any outstanding edits are needed, please update the files in target/temp/swarmout and then mark s2 complete. Thank you.
